scripts.verify:local: npm test && npm run audit && npm run verify:secrets && npm run verify:vendor && npm run validate:firebase-auth-profiles && npm run validate:firebase-auth-claims && npm run verify:security && npm run verify:csp && npm run verify:map && npm run verify:editor
scripts.verify:deploy: npm run build && npm run audit && npm run verify:secrets && npm run verify:vendor && npm run verify:rules && npm run verify:production-readiness && node verify-security.mjs --production
scripts.verify:all: npm test && npm run audit && npm run verify:secrets && npm run verify:vendor && npm run verify:rules && npm run validate:firebase-auth-profiles && npm run validate:firebase-auth-claims && npm run --silent plan:firebase-auth-migration -- --out .verify-artifacts/firebase-auth-migration-plan.json && npm run verify:firebase-auth-migration-plan && npm run verify:security && npm run verify:csp && npm run verify:map && npm run verify:editor
scripts.deploy:production: npm run verify:deploy && firebase deploy --only hosting,firestore:rules
scripts.serve: npm run build && npx http-server dist -c-1
